$comment: Contract between demo-two-protocols.html and the demo.honua.io seeding task. Endpoint ids reuse the maui-zoning entries already pinned in assets/demo/layers.json (FeatureServer path, OGC API Features collection id). ADDITIONAL contract this page introduces: (1) the zoning layer's attribute schema must publish a string field ZONE_CLASS whose values include the filterOptions below (plus ZONE_DESC and ACRES used in popups/fixtures); (2) the layer must be queryable through GeoServices REST (where=), OGC API Features (filter= cql2-text, the server default filter-lang), and OData v4 (/odata/Layers({id})/Features?$filter=) so all three lanes return identical feature sets; (3) CORS per layers.json applies to /odata/* as well. Until seeded, the page runs on the bundled fixtures/ lane, clearly labeled as sample data.

layer.title: Zoning — Maui, Hawaiʻi
layer.attribution: County of Maui · Hawaiʻi Statewide GIS Program

odata.$comment: Honua Server's OData surface keys layers by a server-wide integer (/odata/Layers({id})/Features). The live lane resolves that id at runtime by matching Name in GET /odata/Layers against these hints; the fixture lane uses the placeholder id baked into fixtures/odata.json.
